name: Ben Carson
subject: Will you show your friends and family?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
|
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30394861:29119508498:m:1:876315805:62224FBCDAEB062BC6922BAD9FEBDC05:r)
---

Peter,

On Wednesday night at 8pm ET, I'll take the stage at the Reagan Library for the second GOP presidential debate.

During these debates it's great to know that supporters like you are watching all around the country.

But it'd be an honor to know that you're also showing your support to all your friends and family.

Whether it's a hat, a t-shirt or a yard sign, we have all that and more at our official campaign store.

[**Please head over there now to get all of your official gear.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30394861:29119508498:m:1:876315805:62224FBCDAEB062BC6922BAD9FEBDC05:r)

More than a campaign, this is a movement of "We the People." Help me show the country what we're all about.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30394861:29119508498:m:1:876315805:62224FBCDAEB062BC6922BAD9FEBDC05:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/30394862:29119508498:m:1:876315805:62224FBCDAEB062BC6922BAD9FEBDC05:r)
---

---|---|---|---
Make a donation | | Show your support for Ben on social media
Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313

| Paid for by Carson America, Inc.

name: MarcoRubio.com
subject: No more emails?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,

September 30th is an incredibly important fundraising
deadline for our campaign. Based on our numbers by that date,
we'll make our second public report on how much money we've
raised, and the one that people will look to throughout this
fall.

Long story short: We absolutely need to raise as much
money as we can for Marco's campaign this month.

Email is one of the most effective ways for us to ask for
your financial support, so we're going to be asking you a lot.
But we know you like to get emails about campaign news and policy
issues, too.

So we'll offer a deal: If you click here and donate $5 or
more to our campaign in the next 24 hours, we won't send you any
more fundraising emails for the rest of the month.

You'll still get other important news and updates.

We hope you'll take this opportunity to support the
campaign - your inbox will thank you.

Team Marco

DONATE

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system March 30, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.vervemail.com/p/iJbw5ZgpNe

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://email.vervemail.com/p/oJbw5ZgpNe

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Attacked by a Clinton Super PAC
body:
#
I don't have a Super PAC, Friend. I am not going to travel around the country begging millionaires and billionaires for money. That's just not going to happen.
But the success of our campaign certainly has the billionaires' attention.
**Yesterday, one of Hillary Clinton 's most prominent Super PACs attacked our campaign pretty viciously.** They suggested I'd be friendly with Middle East terrorist organizations, and even tried to link me to a dead communist dictator.
It was the kind of onslaught I expected to see from the Koch Brothers or Sheldon Adelson, and it's the second time a billionaire Super PAC has tried to stop the momentum of the political revolution we're building together.
They'll keep trying ... unless we make them pay a price for their attacks.
[**Make the Super PACs pay for attacking us by making a $3 contribution to our campaign today. Let 's send a powerful message that we have had ENOUGH of the billionaire class buying elections.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2269/43f17890/58274dc6/621cd4d1/4151097337/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pac-attack?refcode=em150915a")
If we stand together to fight back against these ugly attacks, we can ensure this election is about who has the best ideas, and not who has the biggest donors.
They should not underestimate us.
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2269/43f17890/58274dc6/621cd4d1/4151097337/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pac-attack?refcode=em150915a")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2269/43f17890/58274dc6/621cd4de/4151097337/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2269/43f17890/58274dc6/621cd4df/4151097337/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2269/43f17890/58274dc6/621cd4dc/4151097337/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2269/43f17890/58274dc6/621cd4dd/4151097337/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

They suggested I'd be friendly with Middle East terrorist organizations, and even tried to link me to a dead communist dictator. It was the kind of onslaught I expected to see from the Koch Brothers or Sheldon Adelson, and it's the second time a billionaire Super PAC has tried to stop the momentum of the political revolution we're building together. They'll keep trying ... unless we make them pay a price for their attacks. name: John Kasich
subject: Reagan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
Peter, this week's CNN Presidential Debate will take place at
the Ronald Reagan Library in California and as I traveled out
there this week, I was reminded about how proud I am to have had
the opportunity to serve with and campaign for President Reagan.

Watch to learn more:

Ronald Reagan believed that America's greatness came from
us...citizens doing what we can to lift others and try to make
peoples' lives just a little bit better each day.

With your help, we can do it again.

Please tune in Wednesday evening at 8:00PM EDT on CNN or
CNN.com to watch the presidential debate and help me build the
support we'll need to win.

Peter, I'm happy that you're on the team. Let's win and
fix America together.

John Kasich
Governor of Ohio

Paid for by Kasich For America, www.JohnKasich.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system July 18, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://email.sermodigital.com/p/iWqwjl7mxN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:

name: James Carville
subject: Meet Hillary in Vegas:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
You could join Hillary in Las Vegas. | Friend --

I like a tight ballgame and I love a good horse race, but what REALLY gets me going is a presidential debate.

The first Democratic debate is coming up in a few weeks, and you could win a free trip to be there as Hillary’s VIP guest. [**Sign up right now for your chance to win.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjM1MTQ3MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNTQyMzg0S0&mt=1&rt=0) | | [**Enter now**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjM1MTQ3MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNTQyMzg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
---
To recap, here’s what you get:

* Free flight for you and a guest to Vegas, which beats the hell out of some other debate locales
* Free accommodations in Vegas (casino credit not included)
* Seats right up front to see the debate in person
* Time to have a conversation with the woman who could be the next President of the United States

**What are you waiting for?? Sign up right now for your chance to win this thing!**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary-at-the-debate/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM1MTQ3MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNTQyMzg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Give 'em hell,

Carville

| **No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 8/24/2015 and 9/20/15. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjM1MTQ3MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNTQyMzg0S0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM1MTQ3MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNTQyMzg0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive tickets for them and a guest to attend the Democratic debate, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the location of the debate and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $1040). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjM1MTQ3MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNTQyMzg0S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjM1MTQ3MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNTQyMzg0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM1MTQ3MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNTQyMzg0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM1MTQ3MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNTQyMzg0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM1MTQ3MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNTQyMzg0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM1MTQ3MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNTQyMzg0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM1MTQ3MTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQxNTQyMzg0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Jeff Weaver, Bernie 2016
subject: Did you see Bernie's email?
body:
Friend -
If you haven't had a chance to read the email Bernie sent earlier today, please do.
The billionaire class is **terrified.** No presidential campaign in American history has accomplished what we have in just a few months, and they've responded as you'd expect: by activating their Super PACs in an effort to halt our progress.
Now that they're attacking our campaign directly, we have a choice: we can either stand by and accept business as usual, or we can strike back and send a message that we've had ENOUGH of billionaires and corporations buying our elections.
**[Make a $3 contribution to our campaign today and make the Super PACs pay a price for their attacks.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb226f/43f17890/5800f363/621cd1a7/730073597/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pac-attack?refcode=em150915kicker-full")**
The billionaire class has never dealt with a threat like ours before, and this will not be the last time a Super PAC considers attacking our campaign. If we stand together in this moment, we can make them think twice the next time they do.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

* * *

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb226f/43f17890/5800f363/621cd1a7/730073597/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pac-attack?refcode=em150915kicker-full")

I don't have a Super PAC, friend. I am not going to travel around the country begging millionaires and billionaires for money. That's just not going to happen.
But the success of our campaign certainly has the billionaires' attention.
**Yesterday, one of Hillary Clinton 's most prominent Super PACs attacked our campaign pretty viciously.** They suggested I'd be friendly with Middle East terrorist organizations, and even tried to link me to a dead communist dictator.
It was the kind of onslaught I expected to see from the Koch Brothers or Sheldon Adelson, and it's the second time a billionaire Super PAC has tried to stop the momentum of the political revolution we're building together.
They'll keep trying ... unless we make them pay a price for their attacks.
[**Make the Super PACs pay for attacking us by making a $3 contribution to our campaign today. Let 's send a powerful message that we have had ENOUGH of the billionaire class buying elections.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb226f/43f17890/5800f363/621cd1a7/730073597/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pac-attack?refcode=em150915kicker-full")
If we stand together to fight back against these ugly attacks, we can ensure this election is about who has the best ideas, and not who has the biggest donors.
They should not underestimate us.
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb226f/43f17890/5800f363/621cd1a7/730073597/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/super-pac-attack?refcode=em150915kicker-full")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb226f/43f17890/5800f363/621cd1a4/730073597/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb226f/43f17890/5800f363/621cd1a5/730073597/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb226f/43f17890/5800f363/621cd1a2/730073597/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb226f/43f17890/5800f363/621cd1a3/730073597/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
